sys_script_include.description:
2.7 STRY0102134 - Apply Default Schedule to Task Information 2.7.0 | 2021-09-14 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP)
2.6 STRY0091972 - "On Change" of a valid "Suspense date" on the top task with a sub task the "Suspense date error message" is displayed.
2.5 Patch 3 STRY0082087 - Restricted Group - (Portal & Platform)Task Form - Confirmation message - Restricted group selected after user selects OUs or Assigned Members STRY0083025 - Restricted Group - (Portal & Platform) Template form - Confirmation message - Restricted group selected after user selects OUs or Assigned Members STRY0083027 - Restricted Group - (Portal & Platform) Template Task form - Confirmation message - Restricted group selected after user selects OUs or Assigned Members
v2.5.13: - STRY0076598: New method to Reopen a Task - STRY0076619- Task Form - TASK ORDER Field filter on New Subtask form and prompt for user on Save.
v2.5.15: STRY0077855 - Information message on Parent Task's Suspense Date Field - Subtask's Suspense Date is after Parent Task's Suspense Date STRY0077847 - Information message on Subtask's Suspense Date field - Subtask's Suspense Date is after Parent Task's Suspense Date STRY0079667 - when reopening a task, set the Signature instructioins complete back to false.
Has two funcitons: 1 - taskParentHasSubtasks() - returns number of children tasks the parent task has. 2 - taskGetTaskSysId() - Returns the task sys_id for a task that was created from a suggested task
sys_script_include.name: ClientTaskInfo
